definition: Mexico's friendshoring premium is at severe risk of reversal. The 25% tariffs on Mexican imports fundamentally undermine the produce-in-Mexico/sell-in-US-under-USMCA arbitrage. MXN depreciated ~15-20% but manufacturing equity multiples haven't fully reflected impairment. Policy incoherence — tariffing your own friendshoring destination — is directly observable.
evidence: 25% tariffs on Mexican imports undermine USMCA-based manufacturing arbitrage
MXN depreciated ~15-20% but manufacturing equity multiples lag
Policy incoherence: tariffing friendshoring destination is directly observable
open_questions: How quickly could tariff levels on Mexico change with political shifts?
Is the manufacturing equity multiple lag a genuine mispricing or justified by optionality on tariff reversal?
Does USMCA renegotiation (2026) resolve or deepen the incoherence?
